Package de.uka.ilkd.key.rule

Class LoopContractInternalRule

java.lang.Object
de.uka.ilkd.key.rule.AbstractAuxiliaryContractRule
de.uka.ilkd.key.rule.AbstractLoopContractRule
de.uka.ilkd.key.rule.LoopContractInternalRule
All Implemented Interfaces:
BuiltInRule, HasOrigin, Rule
public final class LoopContractInternalRule extends AbstractLoopContractRule

Rule for the application of LoopContracts.

This splits the goal into two branches:

  1. Validity
  2. Precondition
  3. Usage

See Also:
  • LoopContractInternalBuiltInRuleApp

    • createApp

    • apply

      @Nonnull public ImmutableList<Goal> apply(Goal goal, Services services, RuleApp ruleApp) throws RuleAbortException
      Description copied from interface: Rule
      the rule is applied on the given goal using the information of rule application.
      Parameters:
      goal - the Goal on which to apply ruleApp
      services - the Services with the necessary information about the java programs
      ruleApp - the rule application to be executed
      Returns:
      all open goals below \old(goal.node()), i.e. the goals resulting from the rule application
      Throws:
      RuleAbortException - when this rule was aborted
